summary: All new features tested and verified: Emergency Contacts CRUD, News CRUD (backend), EventsTab Gradske Vijesti, Profile Loyalty Kartica, Loyalty screen, Emergency screen, Admin Panel Vijesti + Hitni Brojevi pages. 28 backend tests all passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Emergency contacts sorting in mobile app (emergency.tsx) is alphabetical by section name - 'Gradska uprava' appears before 'Hitni Servisi'. Minor UX concern: critical services (Hitni Servisi) should appear first. Not a code bug, but a UX improvement could be to sort by a predefined priority order.
EventsTab code does not have testID attributes on news cards or section headers - acceptable as no critical interactive elements need testID
seed_data_creation: Test contact 'TEST_Emergency_Contact' and test news article 'TEST_News_Article_Pytest' created and cleaned up during test
context_for_next_testing_agent: New P0/P1 features all verified: Emergency contacts API CRUD (13 seeded contacts), News API CRUD (4 seeded articles), Loyalty stamp card screen at /loyalty, EventsTab shows Gradske Vijesti section with category badges, Profile tab has Loyalty Kartica between Hitni Brojevi and Omiljene, Admin panel has Vijesti and Hitni Brojevi nav sections.

backend_emergency_contacts.crud: Create/Read/Update/Delete all working, 404 on non-existent, 401/403 without auth

backend_news.crud: Create/Read/Update/Delete all working, unpublished articles hidden from public

mobile_profile_loyalty_menu.order: Hitni Brojevi → Loyalty Kartica → Omiljene lokacije

mobile_loyalty_screen.header: Loyalty Kartica + Skupljaj posjete, osvoji nagradu
mobile_loyalty_screen.name_modal: Shows on first visit, persists via AsyncStorage
